data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifying choices to reduce decision time and enhance navigability.
data.technical_spec: Measured UI options and minimalistic design for easy user decision-making.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizing elements' size and position for effective navigation and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Design places frequently used buttons within easy reach to improve functionality.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Ensuring that 80% of content engagement comes from 20% of the features.
data.technical_spec: Focus on optimizing core features that drive the most user interaction.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Attractive design improves perceived usability and user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Employing clean, visually appealing design principles across the platform.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related elements together to enhance user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Strategic UI grouping to align related content for intuitive navigation.
